message:
test(fcp-core): pin ZoneId equality across construction paths (0j4qx)

Add crates/fcp-core/tests/zone_id_equality_across_paths.rs covering
every ZoneId construction path. ZoneId is the most-touched identifier
in fcp-core (every ObjectHeader, Provenance, CapabilityToken, audit
event, and mesh frame carries one); drift in any equality/hash
semantics fragments content addressing and zone membership across
layers. 14/14 tests pass.

Construction paths exercised: factory methods (owner/private/work/
community/public), try_from(String), FromStr/parse, Display→try_from
round-trip, clone, and the ZoneId-only to_tailscale_tag →
from_tailscale_tag round-trip.

Properties pinned:

- Canonical zones equal + same hash across every construction path.
- Project subzone (z:project:alpha-team) equal + same hash across
  every construction path.
- Tailscale tag round-trip preserves equality + hash for every
  canonical zone and project subzones (tag:fcp-proj-<name>).
- Tailscale tag format pinned exactly: tag:fcp-{owner|private|work|
  community|public}.
- Distinct canonical zones pairwise unequal + hash-distinct.
- Project subzones with different names distinct.
- z:work vs z:project:work distinct (the project: infix is identity).
- HashMap-key correctness via every construction path including
  Tailscale-tag round-trip.
- as_str / Display / as_bytes views agree for each canonical zone.
- Validation rejects empty / non-z-prefix / uppercase forms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
